prompt:
Vertical 9:16 cinematic devotional oil painting video clip, slower pacing with longer holds and restrained cuts.

Classical devotional oil painting realism. A widening break of pale gold light breaks behind a dark hill while warm light falls on a cream robe on the cross; visible brushwork, craquelure, aged varnish throughout. Keep the painted light exactly as it is, steady, no added rays.

Scene contains:
The crucified Christ is on a rough wooden cross, robed in a soiled cream garment, his head gently inclined, arms outstretched along the beam, a widening break of pale gold light breaking behind the dark hill and the receding black, the way out of the dark opening behind him. The scene is a painted tableau — a frozen moment, not an action. Nothing moves; this is a still painting.

Scene:
Start on full composition — the crucified Christ against the breaking light.

Cut to mid framing — the robed body and gently inclined head.

Cut to close-up — the inclined, peaceful face.

Cut to insert — an outstretched nailed hand along the beam.

Cut to upper framing — the widening break of pale gold light behind the cross.

Cut to insert — the nailed bare feet on the block.

Return to full composition.

End hold on the crucified Christ against the breaking light.

Micro-motion:
- minimal

Camera:
- crop-based reframing only
- no invented movement

Emotion:
A costly, open welcome out of the dark.

No added elements.

10.0s

9:16
negative_prompt: no camera invention, no zoom invented, no pan invented, no push-in invented, no dolly, no tracking, no rotation, no animated subject motion, no figures moving, no morphing, no scene morphing, no facial morphing, no glow added, no halo added, no light rays added beyond what is painted, no atmospheric haze, no scene enhancement, no divine effects added, no smooth transitions, no motion blur, no reinterpretation, no new elements, no text, no watermarks, no extra limbs, no flickering, no warping, no animation, no action, no subject performs any task, no body motion, no limbs moving, the painting is fixed and frozen, only the camera reframes within the still image

beats.description: Start on full composition — crucified Christ against the breaking light
Cut to mid framing — robed body and gently inclined head
Cut to close-up — the inclined, peaceful face
Cut to insert — outstretched nailed hand along the beam
Cut to upper framing — the widening break of pale gold light behind the cross
Cut to insert — nailed bare feet on the block
Return to full composition, end hold on the crucified Christ against the breaking light
